gate_results.log_path:
artifacts/lighthouse/PG-058/SUMMARY.md — 3 authenticated runs of /dashboard (PG-166 Supabase-auth Puppeteer harness, owner-authorized; onlyCategories perf/a11y/best-practices): performance 97-98, accessibility 90, best-practices 93 (every category >=90), FCP 0.3s, LCP 1.2s, TBT 0ms, TTI 1.2s, CLS 0. button-name + link-name PASS (PG-058 a11y fixes). a11y held at 90 by a pre-existing app-wide color-contrast token issue (out of scope). The unauthenticated base-recipe 74 was a redirect artifact (LCP element = login hero

) and is NOT the real page — see SUMMARY.md.

Full pre-ship diff-coverage step PASS. kpi-calculator.ts is 100% line/branch/function covered (apps/web/src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/kpi-calculator.test.ts, 55 cases); refactored widget call-sites covered by their render tests; new pending/refetch/a11y branches have dedicated tests.

node scripts/codex-review.mjs converged to 3 consecutive clean runs (rounds 15-17). 5 real no-fake-KPI bugs fixed (ActiveDeals/SalesRevenue/OpenTickets/Revenue fake-0, DealsWon/Revenue zero-bar floor) + the pipeline-denominator correctness fix; 2 waivers (decorative progressbar role conflicts with sonar-guard; growth-from-zero delta is intentional pre-existing) in tools/audit/codex-review-waivers.yaml.

apps/web/src/app/dashboard/__tests__/dashboard-a11y.test.tsx — deterministic axe-contract assertions for the 6 touched default widgets (icon aria-hidden, Pipeline-options button accessible name, DealsWon select label). Confirmed live by the authenticated Lighthouse run (button-name/link-name PASS).

kpi_results.actual: Authenticated /dashboard: performance 97, accessibility 90 (3 runs, desktop preset). Unauthenticated base-recipe (74) is a client-redirect artifact, not representative. Evidence: artifacts/lighthouse/PG-058/dashboard-authenticated-r{1,2,3}.json + SUMMARY.md.

PG-058 adds no backend endpoints and no I/O — it reuses the existing optimized analytics/lead/opportunity/ticket stats procedures (IFC-089-era <200ms targets) and a pure synchronous calculator (zero added latency). Authenticated dashboard TTI 1.2s / TBT 0ms confirms no client-side regression.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-001 — kpi-calculator.ts exists, exports the pure functions + DASHBOARD_REFETCH_INTERVAL_MS, each consumed by >=1 production widget (no dead exports)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: apps/web/src/lib/dashboard/kpi-calculator.ts; grep confirms all 8 exports imported by >=1 of the 7 refactored widgets (verified, no dead code).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-002 — inline KPI math in 7 widgets replaced by calculator calls with identical observable output (existing widget tests still pass)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: TotalLeads/SalesRevenue/ActiveDeals/OpenTickets/PipelineSummary/DealsWon/Revenue refactored; all 18 pre-existing widget tests stay green (103 dashboard tests total).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-003 — default KPI widgets poll on DASHBOARD_REFETCH_INTERVAL_MS (DealsWon 5x); SalesRevenue + ActiveDeals gain an enabled auth guard
definition_of_done_items.evidence: refetchInterval added + asserted in 6 widget tests via vi.fn() spy; enabled guards added to SalesRevenue/ActiveDeals.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-004 — null/undefined/zero-denominator inputs yield 0 / safe sentinel, never Infinity/NaN/placeholder; widgets show pending not fake 0
definition_of_done_items.evidence: kpi-calculator zero-guards (55 unit cases incl. edges); ActiveDeals/SalesRevenue/OpenTickets/Revenue show '...'/skeleton when data absent (codex-driven).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-005 — single role=status (semantic <output>) last-updated region; no per-widget aria-live
definition_of_done_items.evidence: DashboardClient.tsx header <output> live region; KPI cards have no aria-live.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-006 — /dashboard passes authenticated Lighthouse perf>=0.9 AND a11y>=0.9 with zero error-level audit failures (button-name/label/link-name)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: perf 97 / a11y 90; button-name + link-name PASS. Evidence committed under artifacts/lighthouse/PG-058/.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-007 — pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web typecheck and test --run pass

manual_verification.review_notes:
Lighthouse perf was first measured at 74 unauthenticated; the owner correctly rejected waiving it. Diagnosed as a client-side-auth-redirect artifact (LCP element = login hero

, 93% render-delay = the redirect). Owner authorized a read-only authenticated measurement and creation of the harness test user (admin@intelliflow.dev) which was absent in prod Supabase. Authenticated /dashboard scored perf 97 / a11y 90. The test user was deleted afterward (login returns 400 — prod restored). No other project's services were touched (port 3000 had an unrelated stale server; measurement used 3500).
items_checked: kpi-calculator.ts is 100% covered; all 8 exports have a production widget consumer
103 dashboard tests pass; 18 pre-existing widget tests green (behavior-preserving refactor)
codex-review converged 3 consecutive clean runs; 2 evidence-backed waivers
authenticated Lighthouse /dashboard perf 97 / a11y 90 (3 runs); button-name + link-name PASS
Sprint_plan.csv left at origin/main state (orchestrator owns the CSV flip); created/deleted prod test user, prod restored

notes: PG-058 Dashboard — KPI calculator extraction + real-time polling + accessibility. Adds apps/web/src/lib/dashboard/kpi-calculator.ts (pure, 100% covered) consumed by 7 dashboard widgets (behavior-preserving), a shared 60s refetch cadence with auth guards, and the a11y fixes that clear the lighthouse-gte-90 gate. No new backend endpoints; reuses existing analytics/lead/opportunity/ticket stats procedures. page.tsx already existed (PG-129) so NO page-doc-cochange cascade. Three pre-existing server domain bugs were found during spec (winRate hardcoded months, getPipeline closed-stage total, YoY off-by-one); the pipeline-denominator one is fixed client-side here, the other two are tracked out-of-scope findings in docs/operations/sprint-18-pg-058-session-issues-log.md. Branch is feat/pg-058 per the CI branch-name gate + dispatch (Gate 4b's agent/<ID> pattern is a stale pre-fleet convention; the work is committed + pushed). Sprint_plan.csv left untouched — the orchestrator owns the Completed flip.
